cluster.title: Contract & type propagation (SSOT audit)
cluster.summary: Traces how app-facing payload shapes travel from Pydantic producers through the byte-forwarding facade into the hand-written api-types TS mirror, the payload-agnostic chat-transport, chat-surface, and both host apps. Nothing is generated and no CI diffs the mirror; core enums are verified in sync today but a dead frontend stub island has already drifted, and byte-exact contracts (SIWE template, desktop env names) are hand-synced in 3+ places.

nodes.summary: End-to-end contract/type propagation and SSOT audit across Python services, shared TS packages, and both host apps.
9,231 LOC hand-written TS mirror of the public /v1 wire contract; server declared source of truth; no codegen, no CI drift check.
Constants-only Python package: deployment-profile values/toggle keys, internal header names, RBAC scope catalog, adapter-allowlist JSON (the one genuine cross-language SSOT).
Six _*-stub.ts hand-copies of api-types contracts plus their consuming legacy routes; unmounted dead island with confirmed drift (todos done vs status).
Zod-validated IPC envelope + channel allowlist imported by desktop preload, main, and renderer; payload bodies deliberately unknown.
Byte-exact EIP-4361 message template; hand-duplicated in backend siwe.py and desktop local-login.ts (three copies, docs claim two).
~20 env-var names hardcoded in TS that must match Python settings loaders; produced the shipped BACKEND_BASE_URL BYOK breakage.

edges.label: runtime_api/schemas Pydantic enums+models hand-mirrored into api-types (44 event types, envelope, statuses)
backend_app contracts (MCP, provider keys, todos, settings, home/inbox) hand-mirrored into api-types
facade forwards producer bytes without re-modeling (0 response BaseModels), so api-types mirrors the producers directly
chat-surface consumes wire types from api-types (ActivityRunRow, provider keys, envelopes)
frontend api modules import request/response types; SSE frames validated with isRuntimeEventEnvelope
desktop renderer destinationBinders type payloads exclusively from api-types
chat-surface re-exports the chat-transport Transport port unchanged
web host constructs singleton WebTransport from chat-transport
preload + main + renderer all import CHANNELS/zod schemas; body crosses IPC as z.unknown
byte-exact EIP-4361 template re-parsed server-side; duplicated in frontend siweMessage.ts
third hand copy of the SIWE template in desktop local-login (undocumented)
deployment-profile constants + headers + scopes imported; ~200-LOC loader re-implemented per service
facade's own deployment-profile loader imports shared constants ('same module exists in each of the three services')
ai-backend deployment profile loader + adapter allowlist loaded from service-contracts
adapterAllowlist.ts imports service-contracts' adapter_allowlist.json by relative path — one JSON, two runtimes (genuine SSOT)
desktop supervisor sets ~20 env names as string literals that Python settings loaders must match (BACKEND_BASE_URL breakage precedent)
RUNTIME_STORE_BACKEND / RUNTIME_START_IN_PROCESS_WORKER / registry URLs passed by literal name
ai-backend re-declares MCP enums + McpServerCard for the /internal/v1 card feed (third copy of the MCP enum set)
6 stub files duplicate api-types destination contracts with confirmed drift (todos done vs status); island is dead code
error contract is prose: FE shape-sniffs {detail} and regexes MCP OAuth-setup messages instead of typed codes
dev persona catalog served from backend YAML via GET /v1/dev/personas (served-not-mirrored, good pattern)
CI only typechecks api-types; no Pydantic-vs-TS drift detection exists
check_route_scopes.py enforces RBAC scope annotations across both Python services in CI
worker-emitted RuntimeEventEnvelope streams to clients; TS mirror + isRuntimeEventEnvelope guard validate at the SSE edge
audit-chain HMAC primitive consolidated into copilot_audit_chain with byte-compat fixtures (Python-only despite docs claiming TS)
UI DeploymentProfile ('single_user_desktop'|'team') re-hardcodes a backend profile value; 'team' has no backend counterpart
